properties.name: Chinaman Creek
properties.location: Pilbara, 5 km west of Marble Bar
properties.significance: Aboriginal heritage with well-preserved rock engravings

properties.name: Gutharraguda — Francois Peron National Park
properties.guided_tours: Wula Gura Nyinda Eco Cultural Adventures. Darren 'Capes' Capewell small-group 4WD tours.

properties.name: Kimberley Wandjina & Gwion Gwion (Bradshaw) Art
properties.significance: Haloed Wandjina ancestor figures and ancient Gwion Gwion (Bradshaw) figures — some of the oldest rock art in the world
properties.guided_tours: Guided helicopter tours and 4WD tours available

properties.name: Mitchell Plateau — Punamii-Uunpuu
properties.location: North Kimberley, Mitchell River National Park
properties.significance: Wandjina and Gwion Gwion art sites near Mitchell Falls. Home of the Wanjina Wunggurr creators.
properties.guided_tours: Scenic flights or helicopter transfers from Kununurra or dry-season stations

properties.name: Munurru — King Edward River Art Sites
properties.significance: Wandjina deities, human figures, plants and animals reflecting the local flora, fauna and spiritual beliefs of the Wunambal people

properties.name: Murujuga — Burrup Peninsula
properties.significance: World Heritage-listed cultural landscape with over a million petroglyphs, some up to 50,000 years old. Human figures, extinct megafauna including Thylacine, and marine life.
properties.access: 2WD — Burrup Road off the Dampier Highway

properties.name: Ngajarli Gorge & Deep Gorge — Murujuga
properties.significance: Engravings of human images, extinct megafauna and thylacines, avian, marine and land animals

properties.name: Tunnel Creek — Dimalurru
properties.location: Central Kimberley, off Leopold Downs Road
properties.significance: Environmental and cultural importance. 750m cave tunnel with freshwater crocodiles and bats.

properties.name: Walga Rock
properties.significance: Granite monolith with significant Indigenous rock art

properties.name: Wijingarra Bard Bard — Freshwater Cove
properties.significance: Freshwater springs and Wandjina rock art
properties.access: Access with Traditional Owner guide only
